baseline.notes: Runs 36→37 converged at F1 ~0.39 — GK spatial gates reached their ceiling (each layer trades TPs for FPs, F1 flat). Remaining largest FP pool is free_kick_shot (30 FPs on 34 detections, P=0.12) — unrelated to GK work. Run 38 pivots to this.

targets.notes: Cut free_kick_shot FPs from 30 to ≤15 via pre-event ball-stillness gate. TP may drop by 1-2 if real free kicks have noisy ball tracking, but the FP cut is much larger. F1 ≥ 0.42 breakthrough.

notes: Run #38 — free_kick_shot pre-event stillness gate. Sample 4 frames in [timestamp_start - 5s, timestamp_start]. If ball detected in ≥2 frames AND position std-dev < 0.04 → KEEP (placed ball = real free kick). If std-dev > 0.08 → REJECT (ball in motion = open-play shot mislabeled). Ambiguous middle keeps (fail-safe). No trajectory fragility issues — single-condition physical signal.
